response.justification: The candidate is technically an excellent match on the stack — strong TypeScript/Node.js, React, Kubernetes, AWS, and recent AI-agent/MCP experience covering nearly every required and nice-to-have skill. However, this is an entry-level junior/mid position, and the candidate brings roughly 18 years of experience at senior and staff levels, creating a significant overqualification risk: likely salary mismatch, potential disengagement with junior-scoped work, and retention concerns. Worth a conversation only if the candidate explicitly understands and accepts the role's level.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple production platforms
Covers nice-to-haves: Kubernetes, AWS (CDK), LLM/MCP and agentic tooling experience
Proven fullstack ownership from backend services to polished user-facing apps
concerns: Heavily overqualified for an entry-level role — seniority, salary, and retention mismatch
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience (MongoDB/MySQL background instead)
Only basic German and long remote/startup autonomy may conflict with high on-site presence expectations

key_factors.factor: LLM, Kubernetes, and AWS nice-to-have coverage
